customer_facing_sections.section_description: Concise overview of the presented candidate and matched mission context.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Use only a brief overview; do not duplicate detailed role, skill, or experience fit.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: Slot-neutral overview of the mission and customer need.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Mention the mission and expected role at a high level without internal scoring, debug data, evidence mechanics, or detailed skill lists.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: One-slot summary for the exact mission slot this candidate is matched to.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Every Candidate Presentation artifact covers exactly one candidate matched to exactly one mission slot.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: Matched role for the single mission slot this artifact covers.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Use the mission slot role and candidate role evidence only.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: Primary skills that directly match the mission slot.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Only include supplied primary skill evidence.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: Secondary skills that support the match.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Only include supplied secondary skill evidence.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: Candidate name, matched role, and relevant professional profile.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Keep it factual and short; do not mention availability here.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: Why the candidate fits the matched mission role.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Focus on role alignment and evidence-backed fit, not generic candidate praise.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: How candidate work mode availability aligns with the mission.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Use customer-readable wording such as on-premise, remote, or hybrid; never use runtime enum values such as ON_PREMISE.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: Experience level and availability facts relevant to the mission.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Do not invent start dates, years, responsibilities, or prior outcomes.

customer_facing_sections.section_description: Certifications or certification-like credentials present in evidence.
customer_facing_sections.section_content_boundary: Do not include general education narrative here.

ops_review_sections.section_description: Internal work-experience evidence that helps operations review the presentation.
ops_review_sections.section_content_boundary: Keep internal and evidence-oriented; do not duplicate customer-ready prose.
ops_review_sections.section_draft_placeholder: Awaiting agent-generated relevant work experience review.

ops_review_sections.section_description: Internal notes, uncertainty, gaps, and approval/edit concerns.
ops_review_sections.section_content_boundary: Use only for operations review; do not include in customer-facing content.
ops_review_sections.section_draft_placeholder: Created from Match Viewer. Match score: {matchScoreLabel}. Skill coverage: {matchedSkillCount}/{requiredSkillCount}. Missing or weak factors: {missingOrWeakFactors}. Awaiting generated customer-facing content and operations review.

evidence_trace_fields.field_description: The generated section whose claim is being supported.
The evidence category used for the claim.
The compact evidence detail used for the generated claim.
